title: Alvarez & Marsal Wants to Make $3.5 Billion From AI Work by 2028
description: Alvarez & Marsal wants to generate 50% of its revenue from artificial intelligence work by 2028, which would represent as much as $3.5 billion in earnings.
content:
Alvarez & Marsal wants to generate 50% of its revenue from artificial intelligence work by 2028, which would represent as much as $3.5 billion in earnings.

title: New programme to promote AI literacy
description: As artificial intelligence reshapes how content is created and consumed, a new communications programme at Rajapruk University is positioning itself around a less-discussed challenge: how to make messages meaningful in a fragmented, multi-generational society.

title: Former Citadel Chief Technology Officer Joining Motive Partners

title: OpenAI president discloses his stake in the company is worth $30B
description: Greg Brockman, OpenAI’s president and CEO Sam Altman’s top lieutenant, disclosed in court Monday that his stake in the artificial intelligence company is worth nearly $30 billion.
content:
OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Greg Brockman, OpenAI’s president and CEO Sam Altman’s top lieutenant, disclosed in court Monday that his stake in the artificial intelligence company is worth nearly $30 billion.

title: NYC public schools get lousy grade on protecting student privacy
description: The audit by State Comptroller Tom DiNapoli raised fresh concerns about the embrace of artificial intelligence in the classroom.
content:
NYC public schools suffer from glaring omissions in student data privacy policies, a new audit by State Comptroller Tom DiNapoli found, raising fresh concerns about the embrace of artificial intelligence in the classroom.
